citations.narrative:
The current outdoor opossum enclosure does not have a perimeter fence around the structure. The opossum was moved
to an outdoor enclosure that is a shed type structure with adequate fencing and materials to restrict other animals from
entering but there is no written approval to have a variance for no perimeter fence from the administrator. This needs to
be addressed and either a perimeter fence placed around the outdoor enclosure or written approval for a variance granted
by the administrator.
Correct by: April 30, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
3.127(d) 
   
Facilities, outdoor. 
The current outdoor opossum enclosure does not have a perimeter fence around the structure. The opossum was moved 
to an outdoor enclosure that is a shed type structure with adequate fencing and materials to restrict other animals from 
entering but there is no written approval to have a variance for no perimeter fence from the administrator. This needs to 
be addressed and either a perimeter fence placed around the outdoor enclosure or written approval for a variance granted 
by the administrator.  
 
Correct by: April 30, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
